# Creative Hypothesis Library

Converted from `79_creative_hypothesis_library.csv` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

| hypothesis_id | buyer_state | angle_family | ad_promise_pattern | best_platforms | proof_path | when_to_use | risk_level | primary_metric |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| HYP-TPL-001 | problem_aware | hidden_cost | Manual workflow is costing time/quality | Meta,LinkedIn,Google | cost calculator or workflow demo | Buyer feels pain but has not chosen category | medium | qualified demo start |
| HYP-TPL-002 | solution_aware | workflow_transformation | Input becomes desired output | Google,Meta,TikTok | interactive demo | Product can show concrete transformation | low | demo completion |
| HYP-TPL-003 | active_evaluator | risk_reduction | Try/inspect before commitment | Google,LinkedIn | no-card demo/security docs | Buyer hesitates due risk | low | trial activation |
| HYP-TPL-004 | vendor_aware | comparison | Specific difference vs alternative | Google,LinkedIn | comparison page | Buyer is comparing vendors | medium | qualified lead |
| HYP-TPL-005 | trial_user | activation | Complete first value action | Email,Retargeting | guided onboarding | Trial users stall before activation | low | activation milestone |
| HYP-TPL-006 | paid_expansion | expansion | New use case for current account | Email,LinkedIn,Retargeting | use-case page/case study | Existing users underuse product | low | expansion action |
